---
layout: post
title: "Robert Jesse Baty - Unknown Cause of Death"
date: 2014-10-04 18:57:00 +0000
published: true
---

<div style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
</div>

Robert Jesse Baty (<i>CADEJ)</i>

DOB: 4 Aug 1903

DOD:&nbsp; 1 Jul 1915

As with the majority of my Baty family, I didn't have any information on why Robert died so young, or anyone to ask about it. 

I recently signed up for Newspapers.com.&nbsp; I searched for lots of people in the first couple of days.&nbsp; While the product doesn't have all the newspapers out there, it does have quite a few.&nbsp; Fortunate for me, several newspapers from Kansas were part of the line-up on Newspapers.com.

I happened on a newspaper article about Robert's death.&nbsp; Electrocution. 

<img alt="" height="320" src="data:image/png;base64," width="316" />

I still don't understand what the situation was that left a live wire 
exposed on the top of the barn.&nbsp; I understand electrical wiring today is
 different than it used to be, but I don't know what wiring of yesterday
 was to have caused this.

<div style="text-align: center;">
~ Tom ~

<i style="font-family: 'Book Antiqua';">CADECBAB</i>

<i style="font-family: 'Book Antiqua';">4 Oct 2014</i></div>
